title: thymus altaicus
intro: Thymus altaicus, also known as the Altai thyme or Altai mountain thyme, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. Thymus altaicus has been traditionally used to treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and skin irritations.
